g.text: four loops · typestate policy gate · brainctl long-term memory · xAI Grok reasoning
Basic tier: 10k posts/mo · no follow endpoint
remote MCP (HTTP/SSE) for Grok — READ ALLOWLIST only
local stdio MCP for TS — mutations TS-direct
X has no idempotency header → this is the guard
like · bookmark · post · reply · quote · dm
submit 24 h · poll 30 min · xAI Batch API
50 % off all token classes · JSONL upload · brainctl MCP consolidator allowlist
brain.db owns the semantic layer · strand.db is audit + ops
X 429 → halt 1h · 429 UsageCapExceeded → halt 24h · 403 automated_behavior → read-only + page operator
sentiment > 2σ negative → halt outreach · grokCall throw → empty tick · embedder load fail → refuse every call
phase gate · what's wired · what's next
typestate gate · reasoner schema + cache key + chaining
consolidator batch submit + poll helpers · brainctl r/w
smoke: perceive seed → reason → gate → log (254 ms)
wire consolidatorPoll into orchestrator (30 min cron)
phase 3: 48 h perceiver on real X creds
phase 7: Pro tier upgrade → follow variant live
action bypassing the policy gate (typestate guard)
brainctl mutations via Grok MCP (READ allowlist only)
prompts as inline strings — file-hashed at load
deferred completions for consolidator (Batch API only)
